step_rationale: ACLY regulates macrophage lipid metabolism and acetyl-CoA availability; affects plaque inflammatory state and stabilization.
mechanism: ATP citrate lyase controls macrophage acetyl-CoA pools and lipid biosynthesis, influencing the pro-inflammatory versus stabilizing macrophage phenotype in atherosclerotic plaques.

references.title: Macrophage ATP citrate lyase deficiency stabilizes atherosclerotic plaques.
